blocks.s: **2980 item(s) need attention (stale / unassigned / unestimated) — clear them to push hygiene toward 100%.**

signal_labels.stale_free: share of open work touched recently (not stale)
signal_labels.estimated: share of open work that carries an estimate
signal_labels.moving: share of open work whose state moved recently

gamification.ranking_basis: hygiene score, then red-count reduction — never hours logged or issues closed

owner_gap.note: Per-owner hygiene covers only epics/issues that HAVE an assignee. 65 of 65 open epics are unowned; per-owner coverage grows as assignees are filled.
